# VIA Global Health

VIA Global Health is a medical equipment and pharmaceutical supplier serving distributors, healthcare providers, and NGOs across Africa, Asia, and Latin America. We source quality products from vetted manufacturers and handle logistics, compliance, and last-mile delivery for low-resource health settings.

## Canonical domain

https://viaglobalhealth.com

## Key public pages

- Homepage: https://viaglobalhealth.com/
- Product catalog: https://viaglobalhealth.com/catalog
- About us: https://viaglobalhealth.com/about
- Contact: https://viaglobalhealth.com/contact
- Privacy policy: https://viaglobalhealth.com/privacy-policy
- Return policy: https://viaglobalhealth.com/return-policy

## Product categories

Our catalog includes diagnostic equipment, surgical instruments, maternal and reproductive health devices, infection control and sterilization equipment, cold chain and laboratory supplies, and pharmaceutical-grade consumables. All products are priced in USD and available for international shipment.

## Audience

We primarily serve:
- Medical distributors and procurement officers
- NGOs and global health programs
- Hospitals and clinics in low- and middle-income countries

## Quote and inquiry

Visitors can request a price quote directly on any product page. Quote requests are responded to within 24 hours. An AI assistant named Amara guides users through the quote process.

## Content to deprioritize

- /admin (password-protected, not publicly relevant)
- /api/* (internal API endpoints, not human-readable content)
